title: oxalis myriophylla
intro: Oxalis myriophylla, also known as the purple oxalis or violet wood-sorrel, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oxalidaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat digestive issues and its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of oxalis myriophylla include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antioxidant. Oxalis myriophylla can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
